dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes waiting for technical indicator confirmation before entering on price movement alone. Interpreted 'primary technical indicator confirms trend initiation' as ADX >25 (trend strength confirmation). Price direction (close vs open) represents 'market has moved in intended direction.' ADX reversal below 20 indicates trend weakening for exit. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved since rule applies to both long and short entries with same logic.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes waiting for technical indicator confirmation before entering on price movement alone. Interpreted 'primary technical indicator confirms trend initiation' as ADX >25 (trend strength confirmation). Price direction (close vs open) represents 'market has moved in intended direction.' ADX reversal below 20 indicates trend weakening for exit. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved since rule applies to both long and short entries with same logic.

source_rule_text: A trader should wait for technical indicators to confirm trend direction before entering, rather than entering impulsively based on market movement alone, to avoid losses from premature entry.
